summary: Completed frontend-only testing of Elevideo SaaS video processing app. Tested login/register pages, form validation, routing, and forgot password functionality. App connects to external API at https://elevideo.onrender.com.

design_issues.issue: Theme toggle button is only accessible after authentication (in Layout component), making it impossible to test without valid credentials for the external API
design_issues.note: This is by design - theme toggle is in authenticated Layout component

passed_tests: ✅ App correctly redirects unauthenticated users to /login
✅ Login page renders with correct email and password fields with proper data-testids
✅ Login form validation works (email format via HTML5, password min 8 chars)
✅ Register page renders with all required form fields with proper data-testids
✅ Register form validation works (required fields, email format, password complexity, password confirmation)
✅ Forgot password page renders correctly with email input and submit button
✅ Protected route functionality works - /dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated
✅ Navigation between login, register, and forgot password pages works correctly
✅ Form elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✅ Password complexity validation works (requires uppercase, lowercase, number, special character)
action_item_for_main_agent: Theme toggle testing requires authentication with the external API (https://elevideo.onrender.com). Consider adding theme toggle to public pages or provide test credentials for complete theme toggle testing.
